Video.summary: As we resume work on our 1966 Chevy Nova, we learn that this project may go from Starstruck to Struck Out.
Video.title: Project Struck Out / 69 GTO Part 1

Video.summary: The warden's calling for diagnostics for Detroit Muscle's next prisoner, their 1969 Pontiac GTO.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 2 - Medical Checkup

Video.summary: Our 1969 Pontiac GTO needs to bulk up before breaking out so we modify the chassis and install new fuel lines.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 3 - Yard Time

Video.summary: Project Henchman is hoping to get a new look with a new paint job that'll make this '69 Pontiac GTO shine.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 4 - Prison Tats

Video.summary: The 1969 GTO Project Henchman gets a shiny new exterior look.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 5 - New Chains

Video.summary: Steel meets style – Today the boys finally lay down some paint on their ’69 GTO.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness

Image.alt: 69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness
69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness
69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel install a new third pedal and show you the do’s and don’ts on how to bleed the transmission
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 7 - Midnight Masterpiece

Video.summary: The guys enter the winding maze of wiring as they install a new ECU on Project Henchman.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 8 - Power Moves

Video.summary: GTO gets new exhaust and wheels, plus learn how to adjust wheel offset.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears

Image.alt: 69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears
69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears
69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears

Video.summary: We upgrade a '69 GTO with new glass, power windows, and a complete interior makeover.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 10 – Pane Relief

Video.summary: 1969 GTO Project Henchman's first drive! Installing a spoiler, stripes & 3D-printed pieces.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 11 – Black Beauty

Video.summary: We visit UNOH where we build and dyno a brutal 434ci UMP Modified dirt track engine.
Video.title: 434ci UMP Race Engine

Video.summary: We reveal plans to transform a '61 Chevy Impala into "Red Sled." Then an appraisal on the finished LeMans.
Video.title: Project Red Sled Debut

Video.summary: '61 Impala frame enforcement, Air Ride suspension system installation, and driving Year One's '67 Mustang.
Video.title: '61 Impala - Red Sled Frame Work

Video.summary: We powder coat a 61 Impala's frame and explore the allure of a 67 Corvette Stingray.
Video.title: '61 Impala - Red Sled Bodywork

Video.summary: We continue on a 1969 Firebird, taking off the rusty sub-frame and modifying the Impala, known as 'Red Sled'.
Video.title: Red Sled Sheet Metal

Video.summary: We tackle rust and lead filler removal on the 1961 Impala, restoring its trunk and body panels.
Video.title: Red Sled Gets the Lead Out

Image.alt: Red Sled Gets the Lead Out
Red Sled Gets the Lead Out
Red Sled Gets the Lead Out

Video.summary: We revamp a classic Impala with a 409 engine and hit the Year One Experience for muscle car fun.
Video.title: Red Sled gets a 409

Video.summary: Rick and Tommy finish Red Sled's steering, clutch and Air Ride systems. Learn how to rebuild a starter.
Video.title: Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride

Image.alt: Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride
Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride
Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride

Video.summary: Red Sled is finished. Look back at the entire build, and ride along on her maiden voyage.
Video.title: Red Sled Hits the Road

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy get to work restoring the engine bay and front suspension.
Video.title: Cobra Cleanup

Video.summary: Our Mustang Cobra Project Sydewinder gets its aggressive exhaust system.
Video.title: Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang

Image.alt: Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang
Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang
Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang

Video.summary: Our ’81 Mustang Cobra gets fuel and cooling systems.
Video.title: Installing a Cooling and Fuel System in a Cobra Foxbody

Image.alt: Installing a Cooling and Fuel System in a Cobra Foxbody
Installing a Cooling and Fuel System in a Cobra Foxbody
Installing a Cooling and Fuel System in a Cobra Foxbody

Video.summary: To keep Project Sydewinder on the ground we need a little help.
Video.title: Installing a Mustang Foxbody Wing

Video.summary: Project Sydewinder get some custom paint and graphics plus demystifying older car terms and labels.
Video.title: How-To Custom Paint Graphics in 2 hours

Image.alt: How-To Custom Paint Graphics in 2 hours
How-To Custom Paint Graphics in 2 hours
How-To Custom Paint Graphics in 2 hours

Video.summary: With a nod to the Grand National we’re giving our Buick Regal more Go Go.
Video.title: Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal

Image.alt: Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal
Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal
Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal

Video.summary: All of the mechanical and electrical systems are getting buttoned up on our '85 Buick Street Regal.
Video.title: Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses

Image.alt: Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses
Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses
Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses

Video.summary: The '85 Buick is ready for some fit and finish with body work and candy paint.
Video.title: How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint

Image.alt: How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint
How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint
How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint

Video.summary: Tommy and Marc give us some tips on painting trim and glass installation.
Video.title: Buick Regal Paint and Trim

Video.summary: We show you a few tips on wiring up your next project.
Video.title: Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing

Image.alt: Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing
Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing
Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing

Video.summary: Street Regal gets an updated custom interior to complement it' custom paint.
Video.title: Street Regal Interior/Payoff

Video.summary: The guys drag a classic Chevy out of a hay barn.
Video.title: Barn Find Bow Tie

Video.summary: 'The guys install a plethora of new body panels on their barn-find Chevelle.
Video.title: Sheetmetal Makeover

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew Upgrades the suspension on a classic Chevelle for corner carving and high end handling
Video.title: Chevelle - New Legs

Video.summary: How to fit panels on a classic Chevelle, as well as repairing cracked or broken fiberglass
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits

Image.alt: Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits
Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits
Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits

Video.summary: A frame-off Chevelle Barn find restoration continues with a dazzling metallic baby blue paint job.
Video.title: 72 Chevelle: Baby Blue

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy plug a monster bowtie powerplant into the newly painted Chevelle Project.
Video.title: Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant

Image.alt: Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant
Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant
Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant

Video.summary: It's another shot in our MuscleTrux series as Kevin's 1994 Ford Lightning prepares for battle.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 4

Video.summary: Ryan returns fire as his 1990 Chevy 454 SS also gets dropped down into the weeds.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 5

Video.summary: It's a chassis dyno shootout to see what kind of power our sport trucks are making.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 6

Video.summary: It's finally time to lay it on the line as we put the two trucks in head to head competition.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 7

Video.summary: We begin the transformation of a tired 1970 Monte Carlo into a modernized G-Machine.
Video.title: '70 Monte Carlo Part 1

Video.summary: MuscleCar gets a hand from HorsePower Mike in stiffening the frame on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Part 2

Video.summary: We turbocharge a bone stock Big Block Ford on the cheap.
Video.title: Boosting a Stock 460ci Big Block Ford

Image.alt: Boosting a Stock 460ci Big Block Ford
Boosting a Stock 460ci Big Block Ford
Boosting a Stock 460ci Big Block Ford

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys slam over a 1,000 horsepower into a huge mid-70’s Mercury with a sadistic streak.
Video.title: The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max

Image.alt: The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max
The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max
The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max

Video.summary: The Mercury build continues with ignition, exhaust upgrade and fuel system to handle a 1000 horsepower.
Video.title: The Highwayman: Part II

Video.summary: Adding an indestructible 9-inch and air suspension to our sleeper 1,080-horse ’72 Marquis Brougham
Video.title: The Highwayman: Monster Mercury

Video.summary: The guys button up the last few details on their 1100 horsepower Mercury Monster and take her for a spin.
Video.title: The Highwayman - Odds & Ends

Video.summary: Old school sheet metal tricks to convert classic '49 Ford into a custom with suicide doors.
Video.title: Project Banana Split - Deadly Doors

Video.summary: How to convert from manual door handles to electric door poppers and punch custom hood louvers.
Video.title: Punch Job

Video.summary: Hands on tech on how to graft in '55 Olds lamps.
Video.title: Custom Headlights & Tail Lamps

Video.summary: Team fabs custom fiberglass bubble skirts and lays down a two-tone paint job on our old school '49 Ford custom
Video.title: Banana Split: Skirts & Paint

Video.summary: Team transplants hopped up 3-duce flathead into old school custom.
Video.title: Flatheads Rule

Video.summary: Secrets on fabricating a custom interior and how muscle car sheet metal panels are made and tested
Video.title: Hot Rod How-to: Interiors

Video.summary: How to upgrade a Mopar interior.
Video.title: Resto-Mod Interior

Video.summary: We fire up Banana Split and install old school exhaust flame throwers.
Video.title: Fire In The Hole

Video.summary: MuscleCar demonstrates how to get rid of a gnarly old Vinyl Top on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Part 3

Video.summary: It's time for the finishing touches on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Finale
